activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A renewal-risk review workbench for a CSM deciding whether Northstar Labs needs a save plan, executive escalation, or more evidence before handoff.
parsed.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f4f6f8;color:#17212b;font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif}.renewal-workbench{min-height:100vh;padding:28px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr)340px;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr;gap:18px}.topbar{grid-column:1/-1;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid #d9e0e7;padding-bottom:16px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 5px;color:#607080;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em}.topbar h1{margin:0;font-size:26px;line-height:1.15}.meeting-note{margin:6px 0 0;color:#5a6876;font-size:14px}.queue,.case,.decision{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dde4ea;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(20,35,50,.05)}.queue{padding:16px}.section-title{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:15px;font-weight:800}.queue-card{border:1px solid #e0e6ec;border-radius:7px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;background:#fff}.queue-card.active{border-color:#2f6f9f;background:#eef7fb}.queue-id{font-size:12px;color:#647381;font-weight:700}.queue-name{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;margin-top:5px;font-weight:800}.queue-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;color:#5f6f7f;font-size:13px}.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border-radius:999px;padding:5px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;border:1px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap}.pill.red{background:#fff1f0;color:#a43728;border-color:#f2c4bd}.pill.amber{background:#fff7e6;color:#8f5a00;border-color:#f1d49b}.pill.blue{background:#eaf5fb;color:#23627f;border-color:#bfddea}.case{padding:20px;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto auto 1fr;gap:16px}.case-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.account h2{margin:0;font-size:24px}.account dl{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:10px 0 0}.account div{min-width:120px}.account dt{font-size:11px;color:#6a7784;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:800}.account dd{margin:3px 0 0;font-size:14px;font-weight:700}.risk-score{text-align:right}.risk-score strong{display:block;font-size:30px;line-height:1;color:#a43728}.risk-score span{color:#687888;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.signal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px}.signal{border:1px solid #e2e8ee;border-radius:7px;padding:14px;background:#fbfcfd}.signal h3{margin:0 0 7px;font-size:14px}.signal p{margin:0;color:#4f5e6b;font-size:13px;line-height:1.4}.evidence-panel{border-top:1px solid #e4e9ee;padding-top:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}.evidence-panel h3{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:15px}.evidence-list{margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:grid;gap:10px}.evidence-list li{padding-left:18px;position:relative;color:#324352;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45}.evidence-list li:before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:.55em;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#2f6f9f}.guidance{border-left:4px solid #e3b24d;background:#fffaf0;border-radius:6px;padding:13px}.guidance p{margin:0;color:#3d4650;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45}.decision{padding:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.decision-group{display:grid;gap:9px}.choice{width:100%;border:1px solid #d5dde5;background:#fff;border-radius:7px;padding:12px;text-align:left;color:#1d2b38}.choice strong{display:block;font-size:14px}.choice span{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#5f6f7d;font-size:12px;line-height:1.35}.choice.selected{border-color:#2f6f9f;background:#edf7fb;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px #2f6f9f}.choice.caution{border-color:#e7c780;background:#fffaf0}.handoff{border-top:1px solid #e1e7ed;padding-top:14px}.handoff-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:100px 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:13px}.handoff-row span:first-child{color:#657585;font-weight:800}.handoff-row span:last-child{color:#1f2f3d}.primary-action{border:0;background:#235f7f;color:#fff;border-radius:7px;padding:12px 14px;font-weight:800;font-size:14px}.secondary-action{border:1px solid #cdd7df;background:#fff;color:#263746;border-radius:7px;padding:11px 14px;font-weight:800;font-size:14px}.source-readiness{border-top:1px solid #e1e7ed;padding-top:13px}.readiness-list{display:grid;gap:8px;margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none}.readiness-list li{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;font-size:12px;color:#5c6d7c}.status-ok{color:#28724f;font-weight:800}.status-gap{color:#a05f00;font-weight:800}@media(max-width:1000px){.renewal-workbench{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:18px}.topbar{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.signal-grid,.evidence-panel{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
parsed.html:
Renewal risk review

Northstar Labs handoff decision

Review before the weekly account meeting and leave with owner, action, reason, and evidence gap.

Champion change

Review queue

AC-903
Northstar Labs$84K ARR
Champion changeEnterprise annual
AC-904
Bright Arc$42K ARR
Usage dropReview next
AC-905
Harbor Grid$120K ARR
Procurement riskNeeds timing

Northstar Labs

Plan
Enterprise annual
Renewal value
$84K ARR
Request
Account planning review
Highrenewal risk
Usage trend

Down 28%

Usage dropped across the last two reporting periods, with no recovery signal yet.

Champion change

Primary sponsor left

The main champion departed last month, so decision coverage is uncertain.

Procurement timeline

Missing date

No confirmed procurement owner or renewal timing is available for escalation planning.

Account evidence

  • Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.
  • Primary champion left the account last month.
  • Procurement timeline is missing before escalation.

Policy guidance

Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear. Missing procurement dates should be resolved before committing a save plan.

Decision

Renewal handoff

Next ownerCustomer Success Manager
ActionConfirm procurement timeline, identify replacement champion, recheck usage trend.
Risk reasonChampion change plus 28 percent usage decline.
Evidence gapProcurement owner and renewal date are missing.

Source readiness

  • Account factsReady
  • Usage trendReady
  • Procurement timelineGap
  • Billing contextClear
